person_name: To Replace Retiring Spector Bishop As Dist
article_title: Plecker Hired To Replace Retiring Spector Bishop As Dist . 63 Communications Director
new_co_opener: Hi To — congrats on the communications director role at Plecker. New senior comms hires often reshape their teams in the first 6-12 months; would love a quick chat about how we can help if/when you're sizing up the team.
